feedback: Working with Ak was an absolute revelation. He has an uncanny ability to translate abstract emotional cues into breathtaking melodies. The score for Stellar Drift made the film.
We needed a track that felt powerful, modern, and memorable. Ak delivered a jingle that exceeded expectations within 5 days. Absolute professional and highly responsive.
The game soundtrack is gorgeous. It fits our world perfectly, and the loop cuts are seamless. Our players keep praising the music in reviews!
